solicitation_facts.evaluation_basis: Best Value (technical approach, past performance, price)
solicitation_facts.period_of_performance: Base year plus two option years
solicitation_facts.funds_status: Funds are not presently available for this effort.

section_blocks.title: 1.3 Scope
section_blocks.text: 1.3 Scope; The contractor shall provide on-site technical support, submit monthly status reports, and deliver review packages for customer approval.
section_blocks.source_text: 1.3 Scope The contractor shall provide on-site technical support, submit monthly status reports, and deliver review packages for customer approval.

section_blocks.title: 5.0 Deliverables
section_blocks.text: 5.0 Deliverables; Deliverables include a transition plan, staffing matrix, design package, and corrective-action tracker.
section_blocks.source_text: 5.0 Deliverables Deliverables include a transition plan, staffing matrix, design package, and corrective-action tracker.

section_blocks.title: Section M
section_blocks.text: Section M; Award will be made on a best-value basis considering technical approach, past performance, and price realism.
section_blocks.source_text: Section M Award will be made on a best-value basis considering technical approach, past performance, and price realism.
